hyperedges.label: Design skills ecosystem for B2B dashboard
Core design principles
Web scraping and data extraction pipeline family
Core data extraction functions
Design system components (colors, typography, spacing)
Benchmark Pipeline: ground truth CSV -> benchmark_run -> analyze_v7/v7b
Batch Scrape Pipeline: batch_300.txt -> batch_run -> batch_summary
Wector UI Family: index + dashboard + bundle_v2 share design system
Core test suite calling main.py extraction functions (_scrape_all_pages, associate_persons_with_roles, extract_all_candidates)
All tests exercising /api/leads/candidates endpoint against localhost:8000
ORSR registry lookup debug and verification pipeline

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.description: React app entry point - root HTML template with public div mounting point

nodes.name: App.js
nodes.description: Main React component - dashboard for lead management with scoring and email generation

nodes.name: index.js
nodes.description: React DOM entry point - renders App component into root div

nodes.name: App.css
nodes.description: CSS styling for App component with logo animation

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.description: FastAPI backend application - handles leads, scoring, scraping, email generation

nodes.name: check_t1_8.py
nodes.description: Test script for validating bulk async scoring endpoint T1.8

nodes.name: test_bulk_scoring.py
nodes.description: Pytest test suite for bulk async scoring API endpoint

nodes.name: axios
nodes.rationale: HTTP client library for React frontend API communication
nodes.description: Promise-based HTTP client used throughout frontend

nodes.name: React
nodes.rationale: Foundation framework for building the interactive dashboard UI
nodes.description: React 18 with hooks for state management and side effects

nodes.name: FastAPI
nodes.rationale: Async web framework powering the API backend with automatic OpenAPI docs
nodes.description: Python async web framework for RESTful API

nodes.name: SQLAlchemy
nodes.rationale: ORM layer for async database operations with Pydantic validation
nodes.description: Async database ORM with declarative models

nodes.name: Azure OpenAI
nodes.rationale: LLM service for email generation and AI-based lead scoring adjustments

nodes.name: Playwright
nodes.rationale: Async browser automation for JavaScript-rendered page scraping
nodes.description: Async browser automation library for web scraping

nodes.name: Lead
nodes.rationale: Core domain model representing a sales prospect with comprehensive scoring metadata
nodes.description: Database model storing lead information with scoring signals

nodes.name: OrganizationConfig
nodes.rationale: Per-organization configuration for ICP targeting and scoring rules
nodes.description: Database model for organization-specific scoring configuration

nodes.name: EmailTemplate
nodes.rationale: Pre-defined email templates for outreach campaigns per organization
nodes.description: Database model for email template storage

nodes.name: BulkAsyncScoring
nodes.rationale: Asynchronous batch processing pipeline for multiple leads with pending/completed states
nodes.description: Async workflow for scoring multiple leads in batch

nodes.name: getContactInfo
nodes.rationale: Extract contact details from nested lead metadata and contact_channels JSON structures
nodes.description: Helper function extracting phone, email, name, position from lead data

nodes.label: v6.16 vs v6.15 Benchmark Regression Tracking
nodes.norm_label: v6.16 vs v6.15 benchmark regression tracking

nodes.label: App Logo 512px
nodes.description: Default Create React App logo — React atom/orbital symbol in light blue (#61DAFB) on white background, 512x512px. Three elliptical orbits around a central circle, representing the React framework brand icon.
nodes.visual_style: flat icon, light blue (#61DAFB), white background, no gradients

links.description: index.html provides root div that index.js mounts React app into
App.js imports and uses axios for all API calls
App.js calls getContactInfo to extract structured contact details from lead data
App makes API calls to /api/leads, /api/leads/{id}/email-draft, /api/leads/{id}/adjust, /api/leads/scrape endpoints
index.js renders App component using ReactDOM.createRoot
main.py initializes AzureOpenAI client for email generation and scoring
main.py contains /api/leads/score/bulk/async endpoint implementing async batch scoring
main.py uses FastAPI for app initialization and routing
main.py imports async_playwright for JavaScript-rendered page scraping
main.py uses SQLAlchemy async ORM for database operations
test_bulk_scoring.py imports app from main.py and tests bulk async scoring endpoint
check_t1_8.py makes HTTP POST to /api/leads/score/bulk/async endpoint to verify T1.8 requirement
Azure OpenAI likely uses EmailTemplate configuration to generate email drafts
Lead model fields (contact_channels, lead_metadata) are accessed by getContactInfo
OrganizationConfig stores scoring_rules and tier_thresholds used in bulk scoring logic

attributes.visual_description: React atom logo — three elliptical orbits around a central nucleus, rendered in cyan/light-blue on transparent background
attributes.purpose: PWA/browser tab app icon for a Create React App or React-based frontend

All tests exercising /api/leads/candidates endpoint against localhost:8000
